trends.headline: Pope Leo stressed importance of dialogue on Africa trip
trends.summary: During a visit to four African countries, Pope Leo XIV called for peace, unity and dialogue. He criticized war, corruption and inequality, urging leaders to put people first.

trends.headline: Rising popularity of outdoor fitness classes in urban parks
trends.summary: Cities worldwide are seeing a boom in free outdoor fitness sessions, from yoga to boot camps, as people seek social and affordable exercise options.
